rationale: Gov't Code §2001.202 governs AG enforcement of agency orders and rules in district court. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The attorney general, on the request of a state agency to which it appears that a person is violating, about to violate, or failing or refusing to comply with a final order or decision or an agency rule, may bring an action in a district court
_note: Rule concerns enforcement of agency orders/rules; proposed statutory amendment to homestead exemption amount has no interaction with this provision.
